pages.raw_text:
A rousing meeting to discuss the
proposed franchise for car lines for
the Washington Water Power Co.
on North Division and North Addi-
son streets in the Lidgerwood dis
trict was held last night at the
Kenwood school.


A full discussion was had, IN
which pleas were made for the
building of the car lines by people
who walk daily over a mile to the
closest car. One woman said that
she had bought property in the
north region with the assurance
that the car was to go out there.
She had waited two years and II
the line was not built she would
sell out and move elsewhere.


The only opposition to the grant
ing of the franchise came from q
few men with corner lots on Lidger.
wood street, from which it is pro-
posed to move the present car line
